Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
18.11 Ferries
Several
islands
lie near enough to the mainland of
Sapience
that, rather than
boarding a
ship
, adventurers may
hire
a rowboat to quickly
ferry
them to and
from their chosen
destination
.
Ferry routes regularly
run
between:
-
Shastaan
and
Ulangi
- Ulangi and
Mysia
-
Aalen
Forest and
Polyargos
- Aalen Forest and Shala-Khulia
-
Tenwat
and
Minos
-
Kamleikan
and
Eirenwaar
- the Southern
Vashnars
and the
Notic
Ocean
To view available
destinations
, use FERRY DEPARTURES from the departure
location. This is usually a beach marked by the presence of a
ferryman
or
ferrywoman
.
To purchase passage, have the necessary coinage in your hands and
BUY
PASSAGE
TO <destination>.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
